name: subscription-churn-predictor-skill
description: Predict subscription churn risk for e-commerce subscription customers using engagement and billing signals, and generate targeted retention offers.
author: alphaparkinc

subscriber.description: Subscriber data: subscription_months, last_login_days, orders_last_90d, support_tickets, failed_payments, plan_tier.

engagement.description: Engagement signals: email_open_rate, portal_logins_last_30d, skipped_months, product_reviews_given.

retention_offers.description: Personalized offers to retain the subscriber.
